items.final_wording: Supports at least 6 months of abdominal pain or discomfort, bloating, bowel-habit change, relation to defaecation or stool frequency or form, straining, urgency, incomplete evacuation, food association, mucus, and selected extra-intestinal symptoms.

source.title: Irritable bowel syndrome in adults: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults with suspected or confirmed irritable bowel syndrome.
source.setting: Primary-care assessment, investigation, management, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected adult IBS symptom-profile, investigation, lifestyle-discussion, and follow-up fields; the legacy workflow does not enforce adult age or the required symptom duration and diagnostic criteria.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports at least 6 months of abdominal pain or discomfort, bloating, bowel-habit change, relation to defaecation or stool frequency or form, straining, urgency, incomplete evacuation, food association, mucus, and selected extra-intestinal symptoms.

items.rationale: The exact adult IBS section supports chronic abdominal pain, relation to defaecation, bowel pattern, bloating, food association, urgency, incomplete evacuation, mucus, and impact without diagnosing IBS or functional pain.

items.final_wording: Requires clinical assessment and examination for suspected-cancer features and inflammatory markers for inflammatory bowel disease, with referral when present; specific cancer-feature fields require their own exact source.

source.title: Irritable bowel syndrome in adults: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults with suspected or confirmed irritable bowel syndrome.
source.setting: Primary-care assessment, investigation, management, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected adult IBS symptom-profile, investigation, lifestyle-discussion, and follow-up fields; the legacy workflow does not enforce adult age or the required symptom duration and diagnostic criteria.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires clinical assessment and examination for suspected-cancer features and inflammatory markers for inflammatory bowel disease, with referral when present; specific cancer-feature fields require their own exact source.

items.rationale: The exact red-flag recommendation supports clinician assessment and examination for concerning context without populating negatives.

items.final_wording: Supports full blood count, ESR or plasma viscosity, CRP, and coeliac antibodies in people meeting IBS criteria and identifies tests not required solely to confirm IBS.

source.title: Irritable bowel syndrome in adults: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults with suspected or confirmed irritable bowel syndrome.
source.setting: Primary-care assessment, investigation, management, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected adult IBS symptom-profile, investigation, lifestyle-discussion, and follow-up fields; the legacy workflow does not enforce adult age or the required symptom duration and diagnostic criteria.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports full blood count, ESR or plasma viscosity, CRP, and coeliac antibodies in people meeting IBS criteria and identifies tests not required solely to confirm IBS.

items.rationale: The exact diagnostic-test section supports recording already reviewed blood or coeliac testing in appropriately assessed adults without ordering tests.

items.final_wording: Supports agreed symptom-response-based follow-up, annual review, and investigation or referral when new red-flag symptoms emerge.

source.title: Irritable bowel syndrome in adults: diagnosis and management

items.rationale: The exact follow-up section supports clinician-entered review, follow-up, and safety net without generating treatment.
